subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, Dr. Esslemont et al, spoken on 1920-01-06
subcodes.first_line: I like this name but the Blessed Beauty has given other names also. Among them I like this name, but if a person calls me 'The Greatest Branch' I cannot object.
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
